---
title: "product_filter"
generated: true
description: "Frequency-domain convolution via `rfft` multiplication."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.signal.fourier`](../nitrix-signal-fourier.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:product_filter -->
```python
product_filter(X: Num[Array, '... obs'], weight: Num[Array, '... obs_freq'], **fft_params) -> Num[Array, '... obs']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:product_filter -->
Frequency-domain convolution via `rfft` multiplication.

Equivalent to a circular convolution along the trailing axis.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:product_filter -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `X` | `Num` | `...` × `obs` | — | Multi-channel signal, trailing axis is observations. |
| `weight` | `Num` | `...` × `obs_freq` | — | Frequency-domain weights, trailing axis is the rfft frequency axis (length `obs // 2 + 1`). |
| `**fft_params` | `Any` | — | `{}` | — |

**Returns** `Num` — shape `...` × `obs`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:product_filter -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `obs` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `obs_freq` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
